testcase.name: shouldSaveAndLoadCity

error.message: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.UnrecognizedPropertyException: Unrecognized field "empty" (class Cell), not marked as ignorable (3 known properties: "x", "y", "entity"]) at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 9, column: 21] (through reference chain: City["grid"]->CityGrid["cells"]->java.lang.Object[][0]->java.lang.Object[][0]->Cell["empty"])
